blended.narrative: Boyne Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 17 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 46°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 5" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 3.2" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 5" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
